title: Output panel component for displaying tool execution results with formatting options
purpose: Renders tool execution output in various formats (ansi, lines, json, text) with expandable/collapsible functionality and error handling.
module_context: Exports an OutputPanel React component and a deriveText helper function. Defines the OutputPanelProps interface and ANSI stripping regex.

steps.content: Extract status, stdout, stderr, output, error, and format from the input props.
IF the status is error, return the error message or fallback to stderr, stdout, or stringified output.
IF stderr exists and stdout does not, return stderr with or without ANSI stripping based on format.
IF stdout exists, return stdout with or without ANSI stripping based on format.
IF output is present, format it as JSON if requested or as plain text otherwise.
IF no output is present, return an empty string.
Extract toolUseId, status, and format from the props.
Compute the text content by calling deriveText with the props.
Calculate the number of lines in the text content.
Initialize expanded state to true when status is error.
IF the status is canceled, render a canceled message with specific styling.
IF the status is error, render the error text with specific styling.
ELSE format the text content as lines with line numbers if format is lines, otherwise return the text as-is.
Render a button to toggle visibility of the output content.
IF the output is expanded, render the formatted content in a preformatted block with specific styling.
